summary: Comprehensive testing of Chat Message Editing feature. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: edit button on own messages, inline editing UI, Enter/Escape key handling, (edited) indicator display.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/chat/{id}/edit - author can edit own message, returns is_edited=True and edited_at
Backend: PUT /api/chat/{id}/edit - guest user gets 403 (blocked by require_non_guest)
Backend: PUT /api/chat/{id}/edit - empty content returns 400 'Message cannot be empty'
Backend: GET /api/chat - edited messages show is_edited=True and edited_at field
Backend: Non-author cannot edit message (403 from require_non_guest for guest)
Frontend: Chat page loads with messages
Frontend: Hovering own message shows pencil (edit) icon in action bar
Frontend: Hovering other users' messages does NOT show edit icon
Frontend: Clicking edit icon turns bubble into inline text input with Save/Cancel buttons
Frontend: Pressing Escape cancels editing and restores original message
Frontend: Pressing Enter saves the edit
Frontend: Edited messages display '(edited)' indicator after message text
Frontend: Edit is optimistic - message content updates immediately
critical_code_review_comments: social.py lines 130-147: edit_chat_message endpoint correctly checks author ownership (msg['user_id'] != user['id']), validates non-empty content, sets is_edited=True and edited_at timestamp
models.py lines 185-195: ChatMessageResponse correctly includes is_edited (bool, default False) and edited_at (Optional[str]) fields
Chat.jsx lines 249-277: startEditing, cancelEditing, handleEditMessage handlers implement optimistic update with proper rollback on error
Chat.jsx lines 383-402: Inline editing UI with input field, Save button (data-testid='edit-message-save'), Cancel button, Enter/Escape key handlers
ChatWidgets.jsx lines 41-49: ChatActionBar correctly shows Pencil edit button only for isOwn && !isGuest && !isSending messages
api.js line 114: chatAPI.edit method correctly calls PUT /api/chat/{messageId}/edit with content payload
seed_data_creation: Test chat messages created during backend tests (prefixed with TEST_EDIT_MESSAGE_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat message editing feature fully tested and working. Backend: PUT /api/chat/{id}/edit checks author ownership via user_id comparison, rejects guests via require_non_guest decorator, validates non-empty content, stores is_edited=True and edited_at timestamp. Frontend: ChatActionBar shows pencil icon only for own messages, inline editing replaces bubble with input+Save/Cancel, optimistic update with rollback on error, (edited) indicator displayed as italic text after message content.

backend_edit_endpoint.details: PUT /api/chat/{id}/edit validates author, content, returns updated message with is_edited=True and edited_at

backend_authorization.details: Guest users blocked (403), non-authors would get 403 'You can only edit your own messages'

backend_validation.details: Empty/whitespace content returns 400, nonexistent message returns 404

frontend_edit_button.details: Pencil icon appears on hover for own messages only, not for other users' messages

frontend_inline_editing.details: Input field with Save/Cancel buttons, Enter saves, Escape cancels

frontend_edited_indicator.details: (edited) text displayed in italic after message content

frontend_optimistic_update.details: Message content updates immediately before API confirms, reverts on error
